calendar.matters:
Notice And Motion To Compel Answers To Post-Judgment Discovery And For Sanctions
Off Calendar Mar-29-2011 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES:

NO APPEARANCES ON THIS MATTER. THE COURT ADOPTED ITS TENTATIVE RULING AS FOLLOWS:
PLAINTIFF CREDITORS TRADE ASSOCIATION, INC. DBA GREAT WESTERN COLLECTION BUREAU'S Motion To Compel Answers To Post-Judgment Discovery And For Sanctions is Granted, no opposition filed. Sanctions awarded in the amount of $340.00. Moving party is to submit a proposed form of order. Judge: Peter J. Busch, Not reported = (301/PJB)

Notice And Motion To Compel Answers To Post-Judgment Discovery And For Award Of Monetary Sanctions
Off Calendar Aug-23-2010 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES:
No appearances, tentative ruling is adopted. PLAINTIFF CREDITORS TRADE ASSOCIATION, INC.'s Motion To Compel Answers To Post-Judgment Discovery is granted. No opposition has been filed. Defendant's failure to respond was a misuse of the discovery process. Defendant is ordered to respond within 15 days of notice of this order. Sanctions are awarded in the amount of $340, to be paid within 30 days of notice of this order. Prevailing party to submit form of order. Commissioner Everett A. Hewlett. Not reported.

Notice And Motion For Appointment Of A Receiver And To Appoint Richard B. Cole As Receiver
Off Calendar Jun-07-2010 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES: Matter on calendar for Monday, June 07, 2010. No appearance by either party. PLAINTIFF CREDITORS TRADE ASSOCIATION, INC.DBA GREAT WESTERN Notice And Motion For Appointment Of A Receiver And To Appoint Richard B. Cole As Receiver is granted. No opposition has been filed.

ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE
Off Calendar Mar-19-2010 Off Calendar
